mapper.insert: insert into item ( shopping_seq, item_name, item_unit_price, item_buy_quant ) values ( #{shoppingSeq}, #{itemName}, #{itemUnitPrice}, #{itemBuyQuant} )
mapper.select: select * from item where shopping_seq = #{shoppingSeq} and del_flag = 'N'
mapper.update: update item set del_flag = 'Y' where item_seq = #{itemSeq}
